# Blargg Game Boy test ROM fixtures

These fixtures are copied from the public `retrio/gb-test-roms` mirror of
Shay Green's Blargg Game Boy hardware test ROMs.

- Mirror: https://github.com/retrio/gb-test-roms
- Source path: https://github.com/retrio/gb-test-roms/tree/master/cpu_instrs/individual
- Upstream commit: `c240dd7d700e5c0b00a7bbba52b53e4ee67b5f15`
- Original location noted by the mirror: `http://blargg.8bitalley.com/parodius/gb-tests/`

The mirror does not declare repository license metadata. Treat these ROMs as
third-party test fixtures with attribution to Shay Green / Blargg; do not assume
they are covered by this repository's license.
